name: HWR_CNST_LDR_BRD_POS_B
description: This table stores the postions of the leader board table.

columns.Name: LEADER_BOARD_POSITION_ID
columns.Comments: This column is the primary key of the table

columns.Name: RANK
columns.Comments: This column reference RANK column in HWR_CNST_LDR_BRD_B

columns.Name: RECENT_ACTIVITY_CONSIDERED
columns.Comments: This column reference RECENT_ACTIVITY_CONSIDERED column in HWR_CNST_LDR_BRD_B

columns.Name: LEADER_BOARD_ID
columns.Comments: This column reference LEADER_BOARD_ID column in HWR_CNST_LDR_BRD_B

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: This column contains the name of the leader board position tuple.

columns.Name: POINTS
columns.Comments: The column contains the points of the leader board postion tuple.

columns.Name: CONTEST_PARTICIPANT_ID
columns.Comments: This column is a foreign key to HWR_CNST_PAR_IND_B table

columns.Name: RANK_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column shows if the currnent position has moved up, down, or has not changed.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
